title: nephrodium pandum
intro: Nephrodium pandum, also known as the maidenhair fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Matoniaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Nephrodium pandum include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Nephrodium pandum are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap the plant's medicinal benefits.
